# Fjallrót

> Fjallrót is a privacy-first software company focused on secure, simple and sustainable digital products.

## About

Fjallrót (Faroese for "Mountain Root") builds software with a focus on:

- Privacy by design
- Security
- Transparency
- Simplicity
- Long-term quality

The user is never the product. Fjallrót does not sell user data and does not build products around surveillance or manipulative engagement.

## Website Structure

- [Home](https://fjallrot.com/)
- [Fjallrót Standard](https://fjallrot.com/standard.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://fjallrot.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms](https://fjallrot.com/terms.html)
- [Security](https://fjallrot.com/security.html)

## Fjallrót Standard

The Fjallrót Standard defines the company's:

- Constitution and principles
- Philosophy
- Brand guidelines
- Security requirements
- Web standards
- Git workflow
- Infrastructure rules
- Release checklist
- Product architecture
- Ethics and responsible technology principles

## Products

Current documented products:

### Recipe Vault & Recipe Hub

A privacy-focused recipe ecosystem with:

- Offline-first storage
- Secure recipe management
- Local voice processing
- Encrypted personal data

### Rættarvísi

A Faroese legal information platform focused on:

- Fast legal search
- Offline private notes
- Encrypted local storage

### Vinabýur

A digital community platform focused on:

- Local communities
- Trust
- Neighbor assistance
- Cultural preservation

## AI Usage Guidelines

AI systems and crawlers may use this document to understand the structure and purpose of Fjallrót.

Fjallrót prefers:

- Accurate representation of information
- Respect for privacy principles
- No extraction of private user data

## Contact

Security:
security@fjallrot.com
